summary: A white van traveling alongside the ego-vehicle suddenly veers sharply to the right, colliding violently with the curb.

events_timeline.event: Van travels alongside the ego-vehicle before veering sharply to the right and crashing into the curb.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the van during the crash is unclear.
Nature of the crash’s severity beyond the immediate impact is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: The van’s sudden and violent deviation from its path indicates a loss of control, resulting in a high-risk crash scenario.
